reason: The v3 candidate executes pinned CE runtime paths but has not completed review of its deterministic fixed-station seam or nogui handleless widget bootstrap.
forbiddenClaims: Do not treat captured-checkpoints.json as parity certification.
Do not count these five cases as active manifest coverage.
Do not claim XPlat parity from matching candidate values until the descriptor is activated and identical production-backed XPlat probes exist.
reviewGates: Confirm TFixedStation changes only exact case-bound synthetic remoteBfoHz and remoteAmplitude signal inputs, inherits the unmodified TStation.GetBlock path under test, and makes no production TDxStation value-selection or reachability claim.
Confirm every abstract contest-policy method and TFixedStation.ProcessEvent remain fail-if-called.
Confirm the nogui widget bootstrap implements no CE policy, DSP, audio, event, or resource-stream behavior and allocates no handles.

Confirm process launch fails before Application.Initialize when DXCC.LIST, a materialized CE unit/resource, the pinned reference definition or bundle, revision/tree metadata, source hash, build-recipe hash, case-definition hash, or descriptor binding is altered.
Confirm the Lazarus 4.6 nogui and win32 value arrays are identical for all five vectors.
Confirm two isolated nogui builds have byte-identical executables.
Add production-backed XPlat probes and active manifest bindings in a separate reviewed change.
